snippet: It’s finally happened — renewable energy just overtook coal as the world’s main source of electricity as solar growth hits 'the largest ever observed for any source' | TechRadar https://share.google/vIbPrBG9kfgN2e0nz
ai_summary: Global renewable energy has overtaken coal as the primary electricity source, driven by record solar growth. This reflects long-term market tailwinds for renewable energy suppliers like tem, though the article focuses on global trends rather than UK-specific opportunities.
ai_reasoning: Broad industry trend piece with positive sentiment for renewables sector. No direct mention of tem, competitors, or UK regulatory/market specifics. Worth monitoring as background context on renewable energy momentum, but no immediate business impact or action required this week. Score of 5 reflects background reading value.
